# technitium_dns_app_config (Resource)

Manages the configuration of an installed DNS app on a Technitium DNS Server. The app must already be installed; this resource only manages its config string.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_dns_app_config" "blocker" {
  name   = "Advanced Blocking"
  config = jsonencode({ "enableBlocking" = true })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) JSON configuration string for the DNS app.
- `name` (String) Name of the DNS app.
